title: Who Owns These Artworks? Musée d’Orsay Hopes Visitors Can Help Find Out.
summary_full: A new room in the Musée d’Orsay’s permanent display includes 13 pieces that were recovered from Germany and Austria after World War II and whose provenance is unknown.
summary_public: A new room in the Musée d’Orsay’s permanent display includes 13 pieces that were recovered from Germany and Austria after World War II and whose provenance is unknown.
